name: Stamp
description: A sheet of postage stamps, each perforated edge punched by the background — stamps tilt and re-ink their centers with every redraw.

code.style: --mark: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --tilt: @rand(-7deg, 7deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 80%; height: 80%; margin: 10%; background: var(--color1); border: calc(22px / @Y) dotted var(--color0); box-shadow: 0 calc(10px / @Y) calc(40px / @Y) rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16); transform: rotate(var(--tilt)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 16%; background: var(--mark); border-radius: 10%; transition: ease 500ms; } } transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
